# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Compatibility improvement
- [ ] Maintenance

## Related Issue

Link the related issue, if any.

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

- [ ] WordPress admin checked
- [ ] Frontend checked
- [ ] Scanner checked
- [ ] Translation Queue checked
- [ ] Frontend Editor checked
- [ ] Elementor checked
- [ ] WooCommerce checked
- [ ] Documentation links checked

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings if the change affects visible UI or documentation.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated formatting changes.
- [ ] I removed secrets, logs, API keys, and private data.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I tested the affected workflow.
